title: Common Gloves applies Hit plus three while equipped

plan.title: Common Gloves applies Hit plus three while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Common Gloves to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Hit bonus in battle.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Hit bonus comes only from Common Gloves.

steps: Player 1 plays Common Gloves and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm the Hit bonus applies only while Common Gloves remains equipped.
riskNotes: Hit bonus is verified through battle hit-roll output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Common Gloves Hit equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
